description_long: This is a compact electronic keyboard with a wooden frame and a modern design, featuring a set of black and white piano-style keys arranged in a single row. Above the keys, there are multiple colored buttons and rotary knobs, likely for controlling various sound parameters and effects. The left side of the keyboard includes several sliders and additional buttons, suggesting advanced functionality for music production or live performance. The surface of the keyboard is smooth, with a glossy finish on the keys and a matte wooden texture on the frame. The overall build appears sturdy, with the controls and keys well-integrated into the body. The keyboard is designed for tabletop use and is portable enough to be moved easily.
description: A compact electronic keyboard with a wooden frame, black and white keys, and multiple colored control knobs and buttons. It features a sleek, modern design suitable for music production or live performance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full row of piano keys, colored buttons, and rotary knobs on the top panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the keyboard, sliders, and the arrangement of control buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the keys and the wooden frame, with less visibility of the control elements.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the colored buttons and rotary knobs, with the keys extending away from the viewer.
